<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Anjolaoluwa × Ceelah — Forever</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400;1,700&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400;1,600&family=Great+Vibes&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --gold: #c9a84c;
    --gold-light: #f0d080;
    --gold-dark: #8b6914;
    --deep-blue: #050a1a;
    --mid-blue: #0d1f3c;
    --blue-accent: #1a3a6e;
    --black: #000000;
    --cream: #fdf6e3;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body {
    background: var(--deep-blue);
    color: var(--cream);
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    min-height: 100vh;
  }
  .stars { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; }
  .star {
    position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; background: white;
    animation: twinkle var(--dur, 3s) ease-in-out infinite var(--delay, 0s);
  }
  @keyframes twinkle {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.4); }
  }
  .petal { position: fixed; animation: fall linear infinite; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; opacity: 0.7; }
  @keyframes fall {
    0% { transform: translateY(-60px) rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; }
    10% { opacity: 0.8; }
    90% { opacity: 0.6; }
    100% { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; }
  }
  .shrine {
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
    max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 60px 24px 80px;
  }
  .header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 60px; animation: fadeUp 1.6s ease forwards; opacity: 0; }
  .header .eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-style: italic;
    font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 0.35em;
    text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 18px; display: block;
  }
  .names {
    font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive;
    font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 9vw, 5.5rem);
    line-height: 1.15;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-light) 0%, var(--gold) 40%, var(--gold-dark) 70%, var(--gold-light) 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(201,168,76,0.45));
    display: block; margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .divider-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; margin: 20px 0; }
  .divider-line span { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent); max-width: 180px; }
  .divider-line .rose { font-size: 1.4rem; animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{transform:scale(1);} 50%{transform:scale(1.2);} }

  .photos {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 18px; margin-bottom: 60px;
    animation: fadeUp 1.8s 0.3s ease forwards; opacity: 0;
  }
  .photo-frame {
    position: relative; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 3/4;
    border: 2px solid var(--gold-dark);
    box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,0.2), inset 0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    transition: transform 0.4s ease, box-shadow 0.4s ease;
  }
  .photo-frame:hover { transform: scale(1.03) rotate(-1deg); box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(201,168,76,0.45); }
  .photo-frame img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: sepia(0.1) contrast(1.05) brightness(0.95); transition: filter 0.4s; }
  .photo-frame:hover img { filter: sepia(0) contrast(1.1) brightness(1.05); }
  .photo-frame .corner { position: absolute; width: 18px; height: 18px; border-color: var(--gold); border-style: solid; opacity: 0.7; }
  .photo-frame .corner.tl { top:6px; left:6px; border-width:2px 0 0 2px; }
  .photo-frame .corner.tr { top:6px; right:6px; border-width:2px 2px 0 0; }
  .photo-frame .corner.bl { bottom:6px; left:6px; border-width:0 0 2px 2px; }
  .photo-frame .corner.br { bottom:6px; right:6px; border-width:0 2px 2px 0; }
  .photo-full { grid-column: 1 / -1; aspect-ratio: 16/9; }

  .candles-row {
    display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 32px; margin-bottom: 50px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeUp 1.8s 0.5s ease forwards; opacity: 0;
  }
  .candle { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
  .flame {
    width: 14px; height: 28px;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 80%, #fffde7 0%, #ffd54f 30%, #ff8f00 70%, transparent 100%);
    border-radius: 50% 50% 30% 30%; filter: blur(1.5px);
    animation: flicker 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    box-shadow: 0 0 12px 6px rgba(255,180,0,0.5), 0 0 24px 12px rgba(255,120,0,0.25);
    margin-bottom: -4px;
  }
  @keyframes flicker {
    0%,100%{ transform: scaleX(1) scaleY(1) rotate(-1deg); opacity:1; }
    25%{ transform: scaleX(0.85) scaleY(1.1) rotate(2deg); opacity:0.9; }
    50%{ transform: scaleX(1.1) scaleY(0.95) rotate(-2deg); opacity:1; }
    75%{ transform: scaleX(0.9) scaleY(1.05) rotate(1deg); opacity:0.95; }
  }
  .wick { width: 2px; height: 10px; background: #555; margin-bottom: -2px; }
  .candle-body {
    width: 26px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #b8a9d4 0%, #ede8f5 40%, #d4c8ea 70%, #a090c0 100%);
    border-radius: 3px 3px 2px 2px;
    box-shadow: inset -3px 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
  .candle-base {
    width: 32px; height: 8px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold-dark), var(--gold), var(--gold-dark));
    border-radius: 2px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  }

  .glow-orb {
    position: fixed; border-radius: 50%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0;
    filter: blur(80px); opacity: 0.18;
    animation: orb-drift 12s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  .glow-orb.left  { width: 400px; height: 400px; background: var(--blue-accent); left: -150px; top: 30%; }
  .glow-orb.right { width: 350px; height: 350px; background: var(--gold-dark); right: -120px; top: 55%; animation-delay: -6s; }
  @keyframes orb-drift { from{transform:translateY(0);} to{transform:translateY(60px);} }

  .letter-wrap { animation: fadeUp 1.8s 0.8s ease forwards; opacity: 0; margin-bottom: 60px; }
  .letter-label {
    text-align: center; font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive; font-size: 2.2rem;
    color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 30px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(201,168,76,0.4));
  }
  .letter {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(13,31,60,0.95) 0%, rgba(5,10,26,0.98) 100%);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.35); border-radius: 6px; padding: 48px 44px 52px;
    position: relative; box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), inset 0 0 40px rgba(201,168,76,0.04);
  }
  .letter::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; top:10px; bottom:10px; left:10px; right:10px;
    border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12); border-radius:4px; pointer-events:none;
  }
  .letter p {
    font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 2.5vw, 1.25rem); line-height: 2;
    color: rgba(253,246,227,0.9); font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .letter p.salutation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-style: italic;
    font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 1.5rem); color: var(--gold-light); margin-bottom: 28px; font-weight: 400;
  }
  .letter .sign-off {
    margin-top: 36px; font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive; font-size: 2rem;
    color: var(--gold); display: block; text-align: right; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(201,168,76,0.35));
  }
  .letter .emoji-line { font-size: 1.6rem; text-align: right; display: block; margin-top: 6px; letter-spacing: 4px; }

  /* Custom audio player */
  .player-wrap {
    text-align: center; animation: fadeUp 1.8s 1s ease forwards; opacity: 0; margin-bottom: 50px;
  }
  .player-label {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .custom-player {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(13,31,60,0.95), rgba(5,10,26,0.98));
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.4); border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 12px 28px; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
  }
  .play-btn {
    width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--gold-dark));
    border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.1rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(201,168,76,0.5);
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  }
  .play-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); box-shadow: 0 0 22px rgba(201,168,76,0.7); }
  .song-info { text-align: left; }
  .song-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-style: italic; color: var(--gold-light); font-size: 1rem; }
  .song-artist { font-size: 0.8rem; color: rgba(201,168,76,0.6); letter-spacing: 0.1em; }
  .note-anim { font-size: 1.2rem; animation: bounce-note 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @keyframes bounce-note { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);} 50%{transform:translateY(-5px);} }

  .footer-roses { text-align: center; font-size: 2rem; letter-spacing: 12px; animation: fadeUp 2s 1.2s ease forwards; opacity: 0; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .footer-text {
    text-align: center; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-style: italic;
    font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(201,168,76,0.45); letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    animation: fadeUp 2s 1.3s ease forwards; opacity: 0;
  }
  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--deep-blue); }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--gold-dark); border-radius: 3px; }
  @media(max-width: 520px){
    .photos { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .photo-full { aspect-ratio: 4/3; }
    .letter { padding: 32px 22px 38px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="stars" id="stars"></div>
<div id="petals"></div>
<div class="glow-orb left"></div>
<div class="glow-orb right"></div>

<!-- Hidden audio element -->
<audio id="bgMusic" loop preload="auto">
  <source src="data:audio/mpeg;base64,
